strengths: 18+ years of full-stack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work at multiple product companies
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks and taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being in the primary stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin and Python proficiency; Java exposure appears dated and secondary
Significant portion of recent deep expertise is in DLang, a niche language outside the target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Python coverage

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with strong, recent experience in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and directly relevant AI agent development work, which is a required and relatively rare skill. His testing culture, TDD practice, and knowledge-sharing history align well with code review and process improvement responsibilities. Gaps are modest: Nest.js is absent and Kotlin/Python evidence is thin, but these are learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range across many languages and platforms.
